case_title: INDOCHINESE HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP. vs. GATARZ, LES et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INDOCHINESE HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP. SERVED DEC-13-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GATARZ, LES MANCOS, BICH THUY AKA BICH THUY MANLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 340 EDDY STREET #505, S.F. $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED TO 2/28/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN COND'N. PERSONAL PROP LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS INCLUDING 1542CC. RENT OR SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLTF. IF DEFT COMPLIES PLTF WAIVES THE $2000-. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
